# Learning Systems

## Overview

Effective learning systems accelerate skill development and knowledge acquisition. This document describes frameworks for continuous learning.

---

## Learning Framework

### Input
- Books and articles
- Courses and tutorials
- Podcasts and videos
- Mentorship and coaching

### Processing
- Active reading/listening
- Note-taking (Zettelkasten)
- Spaced repetition
- Teaching others

### Output
- Writing and blogging
- Building projects
- Speaking and presenting
- Mentoring

---

## Knowledge Management

### Capture
- Quick capture tools
- Voice notes
- Screenshots
- Bookmarks

### Organize
- Tagging system
- Linking concepts
- Progressive summarization
- Regular review

### Retrieve
- Search optimization
- Spaced retrieval
- Context triggers

---

## Skill Development

### Deliberate Practice
1. Define specific goal
2. Get immediate feedback
3. Focus on weaknesses
4. Practice at edge of ability

### Learning Projects
- Build real things
- Solve real problems
- Ship and iterate

### Time Allocation
- 70% production
- 20% learning
- 10% exploration

---

## Tools

- Obsidian/Notion for notes
- Anki for spaced repetition
- Readwise for highlights
- Calendar for learning blocks

---
